Variables.Name: MaterialSlotName
Variables.Description: This name should be use by the gameplay to avoid error if the skeletal mesh Materials array topology change

Variables.Name: UVChannelData
Variables.Description: Data used for texture streaming relative to each UV channels.

Variables.Name: ImportedMaterialSlotName
Variables.Description: This name should be use when we re-import a skeletal mesh so we can order the Materials array like it should be
